parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Scorer & Filtrer').first().json;
return data.scoring_rows.map(r => ({ json: {
  Bucket: r.bucket,
  Société: r.societe,
  Pays: r.pays,
  Score_Total: r.score_total,
  Score_Tag : r.score_tag,
  Récence: r.score_recence,
  Volume: r.score_volume,
  Géo: r.score_geo,
  Nb_Awards: r.nb_awards,
  Nb_Projets: r.nb_projets,
  Dernier_Award: r.dernier_award,
  Justification: r.justification,
  URLs: r.urls
}}));
